name: Legacy of Númenor
text: Play only if no other copies of Legacy of Númenor have been played this round. Action: Each player may distribute up to 2 resources among heroes they control.

name: Close Call
text: Play only if no other copies of Close Call have been played this round. Response: Cancel X damage just dealt to a hero.

name: Deep Knowledge
text: Play only if no other copies of Deep Knowledge have been played this round. Action: Draw 2 cards. Each other player draws 1 card.

name: Defiant Challenge
text: Play only if no other copies of Defiant Challenge have been played this round. Action: Each player may ready a characer they control.

name: Far-sighted
text: Play only if no other copies of Far-sighted have been played this round. Action: Look at the top 5 cards of the encounter deck. Put them back in the same order. (Limit once per round for the group.)

name: Horns! Horns! Horns!
text: Play only if no other copies of Horns! Horns! Horns! have been played this round. Action: Each player may put one ally card into play from their hand. At the end of the phase, shuffle each of those allies that are still in play into their owners’ decks. (Limit once per round for the group.)

name: Power of Orthanc
text: Play only if no other copies of Power of Orthanc have been played this round. Action: Each player may choose and discard a Condition attachment from play. (Limit once per round for the group.)

name: Reckless Attack
text: Play only if no other copies of Reckless Attack have been played this round. Action: Each player deals 2 damage to an enemy engaged with them. (Limit once per round for the group.)

name: The Seeing-stone
text: Play only if no other copies of The Seeing-stone have been played this round. Action: Search your deck for a card with the Doomed keyword and add it to your hand. Shuffle your deck. (Limit once per round for the group.)

name: The Wizard’s Voice
text: Play only if no other copies of The Wizard’s Voice have been played this round. Action: Each player chooses 1 enemy engaged with them. Until the end of the phase, each chosen enemy cannot attack the player that chose it. (Limit once per round for the group.)

name: Waters of Nimrodel
text: Play only if no other copies of Waters of Nimrodel have been played this round. Action: Heal all damage from each character in play. (Limit once per round for the group.)

name: Glóin
text: Response: After Glóin suffers damage, add 1 resource to his resource pool for each point of damage he just suffered (to a maximum of 3 resources per round).

name: Faramir
text: Action: Exhaust Faramir to choose a player. Each character controlled by that player gets +1 [willpower] until the end of the phase. (Limit once per phase.)

name: Rivendell Minstrel
text: Response: After you play Rivendell Minstrel from your hand, search your deck for 1 Song card and add it to your hand. Shuffle your deck.

name: Brand son of Bain
text: Response: After Brand son of Bain attacks and destroys an enemy engaged with a player, ready one of that player’s characters. (Limit once per phase.)

name: Elfhelm
text: While Elfhelm is ready, he gains: Response: After your threat is raised as the result of questing unsuccessfully, or by an encounter or quest card effect, reduce your threat by 1. (Limit once per round.)

name: Path of Need
text: Limit 1 per deck. Attach to a location. Heroes do not exhaust to attack, defend, or commit to a quest while attached location is the active location. Remove Path of Need from the game at the end of the round or after it leaves play.

name: Blood of Númenor
text: Attach to a Gondor or Dúnedain hero. Limit 1 per hero. Action: Exhaust Blood of Númenor and spend 1 resource from attached hero’s resource pool to give attached hero +1 [defense] for each resource in its resource pool (limit +3 [defense]) until the end of the phase. (Limit once per phase.)

name: Gondorian Fire
text: Attach to a Gondor or Dúnedain hero. Limit 1 per hero. Action: Exhaust Gondorian Fire and spend 1 resource from attached hero’s resource pool to give attached hero +1 [attack] for each resource in its resource pool (limit +3 [attack]) until the end of the phase. (Limit once per phase.)

name: Map of Earnil
text: Attach to a [spirit] hero. Reduce the cost to play Map of Earnil by 1 for each hero you control with a printed [spirit] resource icon. Action: Remove Map of Earnil from the game to play any [spirit] event card in your discard pile as if it were in your hand. Then, place that event on the bottom of your deck.

name: Tome of Atanatar
text: Attach to a [leadership] hero. Reduce the cost to play Tome of Atanatar by 1 for each hero you control with a printed [leadership] resource icon. Action: Remove Tome of Atanatar from the game to play any [leadership] event card in your discard pile as if it were in your hand. Then, place that event on the bottom of your deck.

name: Scroll of Isildur
text: Attach to a [lore] hero. Reduce the cost to play Scroll of Isildur by 1 for each hero you control with a printed [lore] resource icon. Action: Remove Scroll of Isildur from the game to play any [lore] event card in your discard pile as if it were in your hand. Then, place that event on the bottom of your deck.

name: Book of Eldacar
text: Attach to a [tactics] hero. Reduce the cost to play Book of Eldacar by 1 for each [tactics] hero you control with a printed [tactics] resource icon. Action: Remove Book of Eldacar from the game to play any [tactics] event card in your discard pile as if it were in your hand. Then, place that event on the bottom of your deck.

name: Rallying Cry
text: Response: After an ally leaves play, add it to its owner’s hand instead of placing it in the discard pile. Valour Action: Until the end of the phase, add the next 3 allies that leave play to their owner’s hand instead of placing them in the discard pile.

name: Silver Harp
text: Attach to a [spirit] or Minstrel hero. Restricted. Response: After a card is discarded from your hand, exhaust Silver Harp to return that card to your hand.

name: Doom Hangs Still
text: Play only if no other copies of Doom Hangs Still have been played during this game. Planning Action: Until the end of the round, players do not raise their threat from questing unsuccessfully. Valour Planning Action: Raise each player’s threat by 2 to skip the quest phase this round.

name: Mithril Shirt
text: Response: When attached hero is dealt any amount of damage, reduce that amount by 1. (Limit 3 times per phase.)

name: Host of Galadhrim
text: Planning Action: Return each Silvan ally you control to your hand. Then, play each of those allies from your hand one at a time at no cost. Remove Host of Galadhrim from the game.

name: Well Preserved
text: Attach to the hero with The One Ring. Limit 1 per hero. Attached hero gets + 1 hit point. Response: At the beginning of the round, exhaust The One Ring and raise your threat by 1 to heal up to 3 damage from attached hero.

name: Song of Healing
text: Attach to a hero. Limit 1 per hero. Action: Discard 1 card from your hand to heal 1 damage from attached hero. Any player may trigger this effect. (Limit twice per round.)

name: Messenger of the King
text: When choosing your starting heroes, choose a non-neutral unique ally from your collection to count as one of them, with a threat cost equal to the sum of its [willpower], [attack], [defense], and hit points. Forced: When you put your starting heroes into play, flip this card over and attach it to the chosen character.

name: Messenger of the King
text: Attached character loses the ally card type and gains the hero card type, with a threat cost equal to the sum of its printed [willpower], [attack], [defense], and hit points. Attached character cannot be readied more than once per phase. Messenger of the King is immune to card effects while attached character is in play. If attached character leaves play, remove Messenger of the King from the game.

name: Thrór’s Key
text: Attach to a hero. Response: After a location is added to the staging area, if Thrór’s Key is attached to a hero, attach Thrór’s Key to that location. While attached to a location, Thrór’s Key gains: “Treat attached location’s printed text box as blank, except for Traits.”

name: Merry
text: Merry gets +1 [attack] for each Hobbit hero you control. Response: After Merry participates in an attack that destroys an enemy, ready another character that participated in that attack. (Limit once per phase.)

name: Steward of Gondor
text: Attach to a hero. Attached hero gains the Gondor trait. Action: Exhaust Steward of Gondor to add 1 resource to attached hero’s resource pool (2 instead if attached hero has the printed Gondor trait).

name: Vilya
text: Attach to Elrond. He gains a [spirit] resource icon. Action: Exhaust Elrond and Vilya to look at the top card of your deck. You can reduce its cost by 3 and immediately play it without the need for a resource match. Otherwise, move it to the bottom of your deck.

name: Bond of Friendship
text: Your deck must be exactly 50 players cards and include exactly 10 cards from each of these four spheres: [leadership], [lore], [spirit], and [tactics]. You cannot include more than 2 copies of any card by title in your deck. When choosing your starting heroes, you may choose 4 heroes instead of 3. Each of your heroes must belong to a different sphere. Forced: After your heroes collect resources during the resource phase, discard 1 of those resources.

name: A Test of Will
text: Response: Cancel the ’when revealed’ effects of a card that was just revealed from the encounter deck. If it was a treachery, reveal an additional encounter card.

name: Estel
text: Attach to a Dúnedain hero or Aragorn. Attached character gains the Noldor trait. Action: Exhaust Estel and discard 1 card from your hand to name a card type. Search the top X cards of your deck for 1 card of that type and add it to your hand. Shuffle your deck. X is the number of Traits on the attached character.

name: The Riddle-game
text: Setup: Choose a hero you control to be “the Thief”. If the Thief has the Hobbit trait, place 1 progress token here. Choose an attachment in your collection with the guarded (X) keyword to be “the Birthday-present”. Attach it to the Thief, ignoring the guarded (X) keyword. Search your collection for Hungry Creature and put it into play engaged with you. Flip this card over.

name: The Riddle-game
text: The Thief cannot be discarded from play or ready more than once per phase. You cannot draw or add to your hand more than 1 card each round through player card effects. Forced: After you place a third progress token here, remove Hungry Creature and The Riddle-game from the game. Forced: After you place a third damage token here, remove Hungry Creature, the Thief, the Birthday-present, and The Riddle-game from the game.

name: Ethir Swordsman
text: Limit 2 copies in play. Each Outlands character you control gets +1 [willpower].

name: Anfalas Herdsman
text: Limit 2 copies in play. Each Outlands character you control gets +1 hit point.

name: Warrior of Lossarnach
text: Limit 2 copies in play. Each Outlands character you control gets +1 [defense].

name: Knights of the Swan
text: Limit 2 copies in play. Each Outlands character you control gets +1 [attack].

name: The One Ring
text: Immune to non-Master card effects. You cannot reduce your threat. Setup: Attach to a hero you control and search your deck for a Master card. Add it to your hand and shuffle your deck. Your threat elimination level is reduced by 5. If The One Ring leaves play, the players lose the game.

name: The Last Alliance
text: Choose two traits, A and B. Each of your starting heroes and each ally in your deck must have either the printed A or B trait, but cannot have both. You must have at least 1 starting hero and 10 allies in your deck with each trait. Setup: Flip this card over.

name: The Last Alliance
text: Action: While you control more A characters than B characters, exhaust The Last Alliance to reduce the cost of the next B ally you play this round by 1, or vice versa. Action: Exhaust The Last Alliance to choose a card in your hand or a card in play under your control. Replace each printed instance of “A” or “B” in that card’s ability text with “A or B” until the end of the round.

name: Timely Aid
text: Play only if you have not played a copy of Timely Aid this round. Action: Reveal the top 5 cards of your deck and put 1 revealed ally into play, if able. Shuffle all other revealed cards back into your deck.

name: A Very Good Tale
text: Play only if you have not played a copy of A Very Good Tale this round. Action: Exhaust 2 allies you control to shuffle your deck and discard the top 5 cards. Spend X [leadership] resources to put up to X allies discarded by this effect into play under your control. The total printed cost of the allies put into play cannot exceed the total printed cost of the allies exhausted to pay for this effect.

name: Strider
text: Attach to a hero. While you control 2 or fewer non-[baggins], non-[fellowship] heroes, attached hero does not exhaust to commit to the quest. While you control 5 or fewer characters, attached hero gets +2 [willpower].

name: Word of Command
text: Action: Exhaust an Istari character to search your deck for 1 card and add it to your hand. Shuffle your deck.
